item.title: About Me
item.description: I’m an Artificial Intelligence Researcher at Avira where I research and develop systems that detect malware Office files. I hold a M.Sc. in Embedded Systems from the Technical University of Kaiserslautern. Before that I attended the Ecole Nationale Polytechnique in Algiers where I received a M.Sc. in Automation and Control Systems..

item.title: Résumé
item.description: Professional Experience Avira - Tettnang, Germany Artificial Intelligence Researcher / October 2018 - Present Fraunhofer ITWM - Kaiserslautern, Germany Research Assistant (HiWi) / July 2018 - September 2018 Education M.Sc. in Embedded Systems Technical University of Kaiserslautern / September 2016 - September 2018 M.Sc. in Automation and Control Systems Ecole Nationale Polytechnique Algiers / September 2013 - July 2016
